This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF +[Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
Doll's Aliemus Generation and Exalt Healing Effect +[Arg3]%, and for each other {Chaos} Realm Awakener in the team, this effect is further increased by [Arg4]%.
